CREATE TABLE test_table (id Int32, value Float64);
SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE value = 1.0;
SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE value = 2.0 AND id = 2;
SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE value = 1.0);
CREATE TABLE test_table2 (id Int32, category String);
SELECT t1.id FROM test_table t1 JOIN test_table2 t2 ON t1.id = t2.id WHERE t2.category = 'A' AND t1.value = 1.0;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table WHERE value = (SELECT MAX(value) FROM test_table);
SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE value = (SELECT MIN(value) FROM test_table WHERE value > 1.0);
CREATE TABLE test_table3 (id Int32, value Float64, group_id Int32);
SELECT DISTINCT group_id FROM test_table3 WHERE value = 5.0;
SELECT t1.id FROM test_table3 t1 LEFT JOIN test_table2 t2 ON t1.id = t2.id WHERE t2.category = 'B' AND t1.value = 5.0;
SELECT t1.id FROM test_table t1 WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM test_table2 t2 WHERE t2.id = t1.id AND t2.category = 'A') AND t1.value = 1.0;
